hero.headline: Four Decades of Pools Built to Last
hero.subheadline: Since 1982, DesRochers has been building award-winning pools and creating backyard retreats for Northern Illinois families. From custom fiberglass and vinyl pools to hot tubs, service, and supplies — we handle every detail so you just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Everything Your Pool Needs<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From building your dream pool to keeping it crystal clear for years to come, DesRochers is your single source for everything pools and spas in Northern Illinois.

cards.title: Inground Pool Construction
cards.description: Custom-designed fiberglass and vinyl liner pools built by a nationally recognized, award-winning team with over 40 years of craftsmanship.

cards.title: Hot Tub & Spa Sales
cards.description: Authorized Caldera and Fantasy Spas dealer with models on display at all three locations. Find the perfect spa for your backyard lifestyle.

cards.title: Pool Service & Maintenance
cards.description: Expert water chemistry management, equipment diagnostics, and routine upkeep that keeps your pool sparkling and swim-ready all season long.

cards.title: Seasonal Opening & Closing
cards.description: Professional pool opening and winterization services that protect your investment and guarantee a smooth start every swim season.

cards.title: Fiberglass Pool Repair
cards.description: Surface restoration, structural repairs, and refinishing from the team that builds them. We make damaged fiberglass pools look brand new.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Precision measurement, expert pattern selection, and flawless installation of replacement liners that refresh your pool and seal it tight.

how_it_works.headline: Your New Pool in Three Simple Steps

steps.title: Schedule a Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your backyard vision. We'll visit your home, discuss options, and provide a transparent quote with no pressure and no surprises.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our award-winning team handles everything — design, permits, excavation, and construction. We keep you informed at every stage from blueprint to backfill.

steps.title: Dive In & Enjoy
steps.description: Your pool is ready. And when you need service, supplies, or just water testing advice, we're right here at three convenient locations across Northern Illinois.

about.label: Why Northern IL Trusts DesRochers
about.headline: A Family Business Building Pools — and Relationships — Since 1982
about.description: DesRochers Backyard Pools & Spas was founded over four decades ago with a simple promise: build beautiful pools and treat every customer like family. Today we operate from three locations in Wilmington, Shorewood, and Morris, and our team has earned national awards for construction quality. We don't just build pools — we educate homeowners and stand behind every project long after the water is filled.

features.title: Award-Winning Craftsmanship
features.description: Nationally recognized for pool construction quality — every build meets the highest standards in the industry.

features.title: Three Convenient Locations
features.description: Visit us in Wilmington, Shorewood, or Morris for retail supplies, water testing, and expert advice close to home.

features.title: We Teach, Not Just Sell
features.description: Our team takes the time to educate you on water chemistry, equipment care, and maintenance so you feel confident as a pool owner.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Guesswork.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is custom-quoted based on your backyard, your preferences, and your budget. No cookie-cutter pricing, no hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our "Generations of Fun" Guarantee
guarantee.description: We've been building pools for over 40 years because we stand behind every one. If any service or construction doesn't meet your expectations, we'll make it right — period. Your satisfaction isn't just a goal, it's the reason families across Northern Illinois keep coming back to DesRochers generation after generation.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build an inground pool?
faqs.answer: Most inground pool projects take 4-8 weeks depending on design complexity, permitting, and weather. We'll give you a clear timeline during your free consultation and keep you updated at every milestone.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pool construction?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work with financing partners to make your dream pool affordable. Ask us about monthly payment options during your consultation — we'll help you find a plan that fits your budget.

faqs.question: What brands of hot tubs do you carry?
faqs.answer: We're an authorized dealer for Caldera Spas and Fantasy Spas, two of the most trusted names in the industry. Visit any of our three showrooms to see models in person and test the features.

faqs.question: Can you fix a pool that another company built?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We regularly repair and restore pools built by other companies — including fiberglass resurfacing, liner replacements, and equipment upgrades. We'll make it look and run like new.

faqs.question: Which areas do you serve in Northern Illinois?
faqs.answer: We serve Wilmington, Shorewood, Morris, Joliet, Plainfield, New Lenox, Minooka, Channahon, Frankfort, and surrounding communities throughout Will and Grundy Counties.

testimonials.name: Geri G.
testimonials.text: Excellent service! I've learned so much since having my pool and owe all of it to these guys. They help clean up the mistakes I've made and teach along the way. They go above and beyond every time!

testimonials.name: Jim K.
testimonials.text: DesRochers didn't only fix major mistakes made by another pool company, they made it look like a brand new pool. Incredible craftsmanship and attention to detail.

testimonials.name: K. G.
testimonials.text: Not only were chemicals cheaper, but our pool has been crystal clear all summer! DesRochers is a hidden gem. The staff really knows their stuff and takes the time to explain everything.
